title: ceratochilus micranthus
intro: Ceratochilus micranthus, also known as the lesser duck orchid, is a species of orchid native to the tropical forests of Southeast Asia. This plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ceratochilus micranthus include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial and antifungal properties. Herbal preparations of this plant are often used in the form of decoctions or infusions, which can be consumed as a tea or used topically to treat various health conditions.
